name: School's Out
author: Poki
description: School's Out is an adventure game where you help Nick escape the clutches of his terrifying teacher, Miss T! Use stealth, brainpower, and sneaky pranks to outsmart her and break free from a classroom that feels more like a prison. Packed with clever mini-games, tricky puzzles, and laugh-out-loud moments, this Prank Escape Game is perfect for players of all ages. Can you help Nick make the great escape without getting caught? How to play School's Out? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Interact with items: E Jump: the space bar Who created School's Out? School's Out is created by ZnK Games. Play their other games on Poki: Hide and Seek , Prankster 3D , Pull the String , Scary Little Prankster , Scary Teacher 3D , and School Escape! !! How can I play School's Out for free? You can play School's Out for free on Poki. Can I play School's Out on mobile devices and desktop? School's Out can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
